nasb.text: The priest shall take the lamb of the guilt offering and the log of oil, and the priest shall offer them for a wave offering before the Lord.

esv.text: And the priest shall take the lamb of the guilt offering and the log of oil, and the priest shall wave them for a wave offering before the Lord.

cnv.text: 祭司要取那隻作贖愆祭的公羊羔和那三分之一公升油；祭司把這些，在耶和華面前搖一搖當作搖祭；

ccb.text: 祭司要用作赎过祭的羊羔和一杯油作摇祭，在耶和华面前摇一摇。
